---
title: "Customer KYC Upgrade - BVN"
api: "POST customers/kyc/premium-kyc"
description: "This endpoint enables you to upgrade a customer's KYC using bvn"
---

<ParamField query="verify" type="string" required>
  **Example:** `1` **This is a query parameter**
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="customerId" type="string" required>
  The unique identifier of the customer whose KYC tier is being upgraded.
  **Example:** `3fa85f64-5717-4562-b3fc-2c963f66afa6`
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="bvn" type="string" required>
  The unique value of the customer's bvn. **Example:** `12345678909`
</ParamField>

<ResponseExample>

```json 200 Success
{
  "code": "00",
  "success": true,
  "message": "Completed Successfully",
  "data": {
    "kycCompleted": true,
    "response": {
      "id": 53495589,
      "applicant": {
        "firstname": "Bunch",
        "lastname": "Dillon",
        "dob": "2025-12-05"
      },
      "summary": {
        "bvn_check": {
          "status": "EXACT_MATCH",
          "fieldMatches": { "firstname": true, "lastname": true }
        },
        "nin_check": null
      },
      "status": { "state": "complete", "status": "verified" },
      "bvn": {
        "bvn": "95888168924",
        "firstname": "Bunch",
        "lastname": "Dillon",
        "middlename": "Joe",
        "birthdate": "2025-12-05",
        "gender": "Male",
        "phone": null,
        "photo": "",
        "lga_of_residence": "Agege",
        "marital_status": "Single",
        "nationality": "Nigeria",
        "residential_address": "123 Paul Gas Avenue",
        "state_of_residence": "Lagos State",
        "email": "Jody.Grant@gmail.com",
        "enrollment_bank": "011",
        "watch_listed": "NO"
      }
    },
    "successful": true
  }
}
```

</ResponseExample>
